name: Orange Matzo Meal Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks well.
2. Add salt and cold orange juice, then beat thoroughly.
3. Stir in the matzo meal. Let stand for 30 minutes.
4. Beat the egg whites until stiff and fold into the mixture.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter into very hot fat.
6. Brown on both sides.
7. Serve warm with cinnamon or jelly.
